chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No. 5179 of 2015 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1.For hearing of CMA No. 22307/2015 2.For hearing of main case. 03.10.2016 Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi A.A.G ------------------------- None present for the petitioner. On last date also petitioner and his counsel both were called absent. Today the position is same. Petition is dismissed for non prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Aadil Arab
